name: Path Traversal: '....//'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '....//' sequences in user-supplied pathnames, where combined multiple-dot and double-slash patterns can bypass path traversal filters and resolve outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '....//' sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing full path canonicalization that resolves multi-dot and double-slash patterns before directory containment validation
